description: Review hints for valid but potentially repetitive module pairings.

BR.title: Branding restriction plus white-label ban is intentionally layered.
BR.message: BR controls trademark use while WL separately blocks hiding origin identity.

BP.title: Permission-only branding plus white-label ban is intentionally layered.
BP.message: BP requires written brand permission, while WL separately blocks origin concealment.

P1.title: P1 already contains a patent-aggression termination hook.
P1.message: P4 can still be used as an explicit defensive add-on, but reviewers should verify it is not duplicative.
